title: Packing items
description: One thing to pack for a trip — generated by the logistics packer from the destinations, season, planned activities, and forecast, or added by the traveller. Checked off as it goes in the bag.

tripId.description: the trip this item is packed for

label.description: the thing to pack, e.g. 'rain jacket' or 'EU power adapter'

reason.description: why it's on the list, tied to the itinerary/forecast, e.g. 'rain days in Sintra' or 'hiking day → boots'

packed.description: whether the traveller has packed it

createdAt.description: when the item was added to the list
